title: eryngium urbanianum
intro: Eryngium urbanianum, also known as Urban's Sea Holly, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of Eryngium urbanianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and is also sometimes used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and soothing properties.
